sections.title: Should Have — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Should Have is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + should have + past participle (regret about the past). Rules: 'Should have' expresses regret — something that was the right thing to do but wasn't done | Formula: should have + V3 (past participle) | Negative: should not have + V3 | Same form for all subjects
sections.formula: Subject + should have + past participle (regret about the past)

examples.hindi: मुझे पहले आना चाहिए था।
examples.english: I should have come earlier.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें उससे माफी मांगनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: You should have apologized to him.

examples.hindi: उसे ज्यादा मेहनत करनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: He should have worked harder.

examples.hindi: मुझे यह पहले बताना चाहिए था।
examples.english: I should have told this earlier.

examples.hindi: हमें ज्यादा सावधान रहना चाहिए था।
examples.english: We should have been more careful.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें उसकी बात सुननी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: You should have listened to him.

sections.title: Should Have — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Should Have for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + should have + past participle (regret about the past)

examples.hindi: उसे सच बोलना चाहिए था।
examples.english: She should have told the truth.

examples.hindi: मुझे यह किताब पढ़नी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: I should have read this book.

examples.hindi: हमें समय पर पहुँचना चाहिए था।
examples.english: We should have arrived on time.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें यह गलती नहीं करनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: You should not have made this mistake.

examples.hindi: उसे मुझे बताना चाहिए था।
examples.english: He should have told me.

examples.hindi: मुझे ज्यादा पैसे बचाने चाहिए थे।
examples.english: I should have saved more money.

sections.title: Should Have — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Should Have — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Should Have in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + should have + past participle (regret about the past)

examples.hindi: हमें पहले सोचना चाहिए था।
examples.english: We should have thought earlier.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें उसे रोकना चाहिए था।
examples.english: You should have stopped him.

examples.hindi: उसे यह जॉब नहीं छोड़नी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: She should not have left this job.

examples.hindi: मुझे ज्यादा practice करनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: I should have practiced more.

sections.title: Should Have — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Should Have — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Should Have. Common mistakes: wrong verb form after the modal, or missing "have" in perfect modals.
sections.formula: Subject + should have + past participle (regret about the past)

examples.hindi: हमें उसकी मदद करनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: We should have helped him.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें अपनी बात सही से कहनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: You should have expressed your point correctly.

examples.hindi: उसे अपनी गलती स्वीकार करनी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: He should have accepted his mistake.

examples.hindi: मुझे और सावधानी से गाड़ी चलानी चाहिए थी।
examples.english: I should have driven more carefully.
